# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.309 — Military Academy License Plates

The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who:

    (1) are graduates of:

        (A) the United States Military Academy;

        (B) the United States Naval Academy;

        (C) the United States Air Force Academy;

        (D) the United States Merchant Marine Academy; or

        (E) the United States Coast Guard Academy; and

    (2) are current or former commissioned officers of the United States armed forces.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 397 (S.B.165), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*
